opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach burns like a furnace, it wakes me up at 2 AM every night in agony, and I feel nauseous whenever I try to eat.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning under my ribs has been going on for about a month, it wakes me every night and I keep being sick, and now I can't even finish a meal.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 weeks ago, came on gradually
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a month and not settling
symptom_narrative.character: a burning, gnawing pain high up in the middle of my belly, under the ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe at night, bad enough to wake me at 2 in the morning in agony
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: up the top of my tummy, in the middle, under the breastbone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse shortly after I eat, and it wakes me in the small hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: eating seems to set it off and I feel sick with it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling sick most days and vomiting, filling up after only a few mouthfuls, and I've lost weight without trying
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a bit of indigestion before but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm exhausted because the pain keeps waking me every night

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: arthritis in my knee that's been giving me a lot of pain
past_medical_history.how_managed: I take ibuprofen for it most days

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: ibuprofen 400 mg, three times a day

objective_data_offered.value: I look worn out and uncomfortable and I keep holding the top of my belly
I've dropped about 3 kilos over the last month without trying
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated, not a measured serial weight

objective_data_offered.value: there's a big bottle of over-the-counter ibuprofen on my bedside table
